title: Psychopath
overview: After being tormented by a psychopath who was once a bullied schoolmate with a childhood crush on her, Tina decides that she can no longer allow him to control her fears. Having sympathy for the mentally deranged man prevented her from taking any measures to hurt him. So she plots a plan along with her Detective father to capture Cameron Crowe and put him away for good.
